text:
A Ditto Duo vs. Team Rocket! | Pokémon: DP Sinnoh League Victors | Official Clip
A Meowth trio, a cute Ditto duo, and a classic Team Rocket battle and blastoff.

This clip from Pokémon: DP Sinnoh League Victors has it all. 👏👏
